name: channel
description: Deliver a message through a communication channel and optionally receive a reply. When a reply is expected, the provider includes a short correlation ID in the delivered message so the recipient can reference it in their response. The provider handles delivery mechanics, ID matching, and reply retrieval.

behavior.input: A message string and whether a reply is expected
behavior.output: Delivery confirmation with a message ID. When a reply is expected, a mechanism to retrieve the response by message ID. Replies may time out.
